jobs.name: morning-self-improvement
jobs.prompt: Morning self-improvement + content cycle. 1) Search GitHub/Twitter/Reddit for AI agent business opportunities. 2) Draft a LinkedIn post about AI agents for business. MUST include Gumroad link: https://fr3k.gumroad.com or https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/starter-25. End every post with CTA: Get started -> fr3k.gumroad.com. 3) Post via: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/postiz-post.sh "post content with https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/starter-25" linkedin. 4) For each discovery: evaluate if it helps mcpintelligence.com.au revenue. If yes, create a skill. Execute everything without asking.

jobs.name: evening-self-improvement
jobs.prompt: Evening self-improvement + content cycle. 1) Search for AI agent trends on GitHub/HN. 2) Draft a TikTok post about AI agents. MUST include Gumroad link: https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/complete-150. End with CTA: Full system -> fr3k.gumroad.com/l/complete-150. 3) Post via: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/postiz-post.sh "post content with https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/complete-150" tiktok. 4) Run improvement cycle. Integrate any valuable discoveries. Execute everything without asking.

jobs.name: midday-content
jobs.prompt: Midday content post. Draft a LinkedIn post about a specific AI agent use case (customer support, lead gen, content creation). MUST include Gumroad link: https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/skills-40. End with CTA: Grab the skill pack -> fr3k.gumroad.com/l/skills-40. Post via: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/postiz-post.sh "post content with https://fr3k.gumroad.com/l/skills-40" linkedin. Execute without asking.
